description_long: This is a single, heeled dress shoe with a rounded toe and a deep blue upper, featuring decorative perforations and stitching along the edges. The shoe has a medium-height, curved heel and a white interior lining that is partially visible. The lacing system consists of blue laces tied in a bow, with eyelets reinforced by stitching. The sole appears to be made of a different, lighter material, possibly rubber or synthetic, and is slightly raised at the toe. The shoe's surface has a matte finish with subtle textural details, and the overall design suggests a formal or semi-formal style. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A blue heeled dress shoe with decorative stitching, blue laces, and a white interior lining. The shoe has a matte finish and a medium-height curved heel.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the rounded toe, blue laces tied in a bow, and decorative stitching on the upper.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the curved heel and the smooth, blue back of the shoe.
description_view_2: Angled front view displaying the toe, lacing, and the transition between the blue upper and the lighter sole.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the white interior lining and the arrangement of the laces.
